toolchain_notes: no Mathlib, use theorem not lemma. lakefile.toml globs=[FVSquad.+*]. LogUnstable/IsUpToDate NO namespace. ReadOnly has namespace FVSquad.ReadOnly. Lean4 operator precedence: existential binder ∃ x ∈ l, P stops at = (prec 50), so write ∃ x ∈ l, (x.1 == c) = true with explicit parens. Bool if-then-else desugars to ite (b = true) so use if_pos/if_neg not simp only [h, ite_true/ite_false]. List.any_map exists in stdlib.
